name: lakshx-tab
description: Cursor/Zed-style next-edit prediction: after an edit, predicts and ghost-texts the developer's next likely edit, accepted with Tab via VS Code's built-in inline-completion UI.

lakshxTab.enabled.description: Predict and ghost-text the next likely edit as you type. Uses the same provider configured in ~/.lakshx/providers.json as the main LakshX agent.

lakshxTab.debounceMs.description: Idle time (ms) after the last keystroke/cursor move before a prediction request is made. Higher = fewer model calls, more perceived lag.

lakshxTab.requestTimeoutMs.description: Max time (ms) to wait for a prediction before giving up silently (no ghost text shown, no error).
